10#include "Hexagon.h"
11#include "llvm/IR/Module.h"
12#include "llvm/Support/TargetRegistry.h"
13using namespace llvm;
14
15Target llvm::TheHexagonTarget;
16
17extern "C" void LLVMInitializeHexagonTargetInfo() {
18 RegisterTarget<Triple::hexagon, /*HasJIT=*/false> X(TheHexagonTarget, "hexagon", "Hexagon");
19}
